title: bupleurum fruticescens subsp. spinosum
intro: Bupleurum fruticescens subsp. spinosum, also known as the spiny hare's ear, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatoid arthritis symptoms, and enhancing the immune system. Bupleurum fruticescens subsp. spinosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
